summary: Turn customer interviews into your product roadmap Discussion | Link
content: Nugget AI turns customer interviews into product evidence. Record or upload calls → AI extracts pain points and feature requests → synthesis surfaces themes → auto-generated PRDs with real customer quotes → dev-ready handoff to Linear & GitHub. NEW: MCP server. Connect Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or Codex — your AI agent can search every interview and draft specs grounded in real evidence. No more copy-pasting. Half the price of Dovetail.
chineseSummary: 将客户访谈转化为您的产品路线图关联
chineseContent: Nugget AI 将客户访谈转化为产品证据。记录或上传通话 → AI 提取痛点和功能请求 → 综合表面主题 → 自动生成带有真实客户报价的 PRD → 开发就绪移交给 Linear 和 GitHub。新：MCP 服务器。连接 Claude、ChatGPT、Cursor 或 Codex — 您的 AI 代理可以搜索每一次采访并起草基于真实证据的规范。不再需要复制粘贴。燕尾价格的一半。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
